headline: PIZZA HUT INTRODUCES NEW HUT REWARDS, EVOLVING LOYALTY INTO A MEMBERSHIP THAT DELIVERS MORE VALUE AND ACCESS
summary: Pizza Hut just relaunched its Hut Rewards program, evolving it into a new, next-generation membership designed to deliver ongoing value, exclusive access and new experiences for customers.

headline: A Look At Yum Brands (YUM) Valuation After Recent Share Price Consolidation
summary: Yum! Brands context after recent trading move Yum! Brands (YUM) recently closed at US$161.82. The stock has shown mixed short term moves, including a 0.6% one day decline and a small gain over the past week, while remaining positive over the month and the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Yum! Brands. Looking beyond the recent pullback, Yum!
